[[en:Japanese imperial tombs]][[ja:天皇陵]][[ko:천황릉]] {{Short description|List of tombs of emperors of Japan}} This is a list of tombs or {{ill|Mausoleum|en|Mausoleum|qid=Q162875|lt=Mausoleum|1=Mausoleum}}s of {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Japanese Emperors|1=Emperor of Japan}} according to the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|qid=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}}. Its 124 entries include historic emperors as well as legendary emperors.{{cite web |url=http://www.kunaicho.go.jp/e-about/shisetsu/ryobo.html |title=Ryobo (Mausolea and Tombs) |website= The Imperial Household Agency |publisher={{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|qid=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}} |accessdate=15 January 2014}} ==Tombs== ;Key {| class="wikitable" |- | style="background:#d0e7ff;"|^ | Legendary Emperors |} {{GeoGroupTemplate}} {| class="wikitable sortable" width="100%" |- !align="left" style="background:#ffd700;" | # !align="left" style="background:#ffd700;" | Emperor !align="left" style="background:#ffd700;" | Died !align="left" style="background:#ffd700;" | Tomb !style="background:#ffd700;" |Alternative name ! align="left" style="background:#ffd700;" | Type !style="background:#ffd700;" | Location !align="left" style="background:#ffd700;" class="unsortable"|image |- | 1 |style="background:#D0E7FF"| {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}* | {{dts|585|4|9|BC}} | {{nihongo3||畝傍山東北陵|unebiyama no ushitora no sumi no misasagi}} | | knoll, hummock (円丘) | {{sort|Nara Kashihara Okubocho|Ōkubochō, [[Kashihara, Nara|Kashihara]], [[Nara Prefecture|Nara]]}}
{{coord|34|29|50.91|N|135|47|16.65|E|type:landmark_scale:1000_region:JP|name=Emperor Jimmu}} | [[File:Jinmu-tenno-unebiyama-no-ushitora-no-misasagi2.jpg|150px|alt=Wooden torii gate and concrete fence in front of trees.]] |- | 2 |style="background:#D0E7FF"| {{ill|Emperor Suizei|en|Emperor Suizei|qid=Q313321|lt=Emperor Suizei|1=Emperor Suizei}}* | {{dts|549|||BC}} | {{nihongo3||桃花鳥田丘上陵|tsukida no oka no e no misasagi}} | | knoll, hummock (円丘) | {{sort|Nara Kashihara Shijocho|{{ill|Shijo Kofun group|lt=Shijō Kofun group|ja|四条古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shijo Kofun group|1=Shijō Kofun Group|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11420005}}, Shijōchō, [[Kashihara, Nara|Kashihara]], [[Nara Prefecture|Nara]]}}
